bbox-clip: Clip a Feature to a bounding box using lineclip. Polygons become polygon intersections, LineStrings become clipped segments, Points keep those inside.
booleanOverlap: Compare two geometries of the same dimension. Returns true when their intersection is a geometry of that dimension but different from both inputs.
line-slice-along: Take a line, a start distance and a stop distance along it, and return the subsection of the line between those two points on the original path.
sector: Create a circular sector of a given radius centered at a Point, between two bearings measured clockwise from North (0 is due North of the center).
json-execute-javascript: Execute a JavaScript script with a JSON object bound as the global variable 'json'. Returns the value of the last expression evaluated in the script.
cloudflare-model: Run any model from the Cloudflare Workers AI catalog. Pick one and the node rebuilds its inputs and outputs from the model's published schema.
